nodes.name: AxonDAO
nodes.desc: Neuroscience-focused DAO. Diagnostic inference on EEG/MRI streams. AXGT token on Ethereum.
nodes.techStack: Ethereum, AXGT token, EEG/MRI ML models
nodes.compNote: AI diagnostic inference differs from our credibility AI. Potential domain partner.
nodes.finModel: DAO Treasury. AXGT token. Early stage.
nodes.finNote: Neuroscience-focused BioDAO. EEG/MRI AI inference. Part of emerging BioDAO ecosystem.

nodes.name: DataLake
nodes.desc: Consent-bound dataset curation with AI curator agents. LAKE token.
nodes.techStack: Ethereum, LAKE token, AI curator agents
nodes.compNote: AI data curation. Consent approach relevant to reviewer data.
nodes.finModel: Token sale. LAKE token. AI curator agents.
nodes.finNote: Consent-bound dataset curation. Token-incentivized data marketplace.

nodes.name: elizaOS
nodes.desc: Open-source AI agent framework. Protein-design hypothesis generation via agent swarms.
nodes.techStack: Solana, TypeScript, multi-agent swarms, open source
nodes.compNote: Agent framework. Could build reviewer-matching agents on elizaOS.
nodes.finModel: VC + Token. Open source AI agent framework.
nodes.finNote: Shaw project. Solana-based. Open source but commercial backing.

nodes.name: Galeon Care
nodes.desc: Federated learning across 20+ French hospitals. GALEON token. Atlantis DAO community layer.
nodes.techStack: Ethereum, GALEON token, federated learning, Atlantis DAO
nodes.compNote: Hospital EHR. Federated learning informs distributed AI design.
nodes.finModel: ICO (~$15M). SaaS EHR revenue from 12+ French hospitals. GALEON token buyback-and-burn.
nodes.finNote: French SAS. Only DeSci project with real clinical deployment (500K+ patient records). Token tied to hospital onboarding milestones.

nodes.name: Hetu Protocol
nodes.desc: Adversarial AI agents stress-test causal graphs. Proof of Cognitive Work (POCW) consensus.
nodes.decentNote: Deep epistemic architecture. Adversarial verification. High decentralization.
nodes.compNote: Adversarial stress-testing aligns with credibility verification. POCW consensus relevant.
nodes.finModel: Grants only. POCW consensus. Research-focused.
nodes.finNote: Adversarial AI verification. Proof of Cognitive Work. Grant-funded, no commercial model yet.

nodes.name: LabDAO
nodes.desc: Decentralized compute for reproducible scientific workflows. PLEX on Bacalhau.
nodes.compNote: Compute partner. PLEX workflows could validate papers we review. Different stack layer.
nodes.finModel: Grants + DAO ($3.6M). Molecule, Gnosis DAO, Balaji invested. Open source compute.
nodes.finNote: Decentralized life science compute. PLEX on Bacalhau. No token (yet). Free for researchers. Strong commons orientation.

nodes.name: Prime Intellect
nodes.desc: Distributed LLM/RL training. Replayable proofs for compute verification.
nodes.techStack: Distributed training, replayable proofs, GPU coordination
nodes.compNote: Distributed compute. Could provide AI model training infra. No publishing overlap.
nodes.finModel: VC ($70.4M: $15M Series A Founders Fund, $49.9M Series B). Token planned but not launched.
nodes.finNote: Distributed AI training. Andrej Karpathy, Clem Delangue (Hugging Face), Emad Mostaque angels. Best-funded pure compute play.

nodes.name: Pump Science
nodes.desc: Gamified longevity research. CV bots grade live assays. RIF/URO tokens.
nodes.decentNote: Token speculation drives participation. Low governance.
nodes.compNote: Gamified evaluation. CV grading is narrow version of our AI credibility concept.
nodes.finModel: Trading fees (75% fund next experiment). Supplement storefront. Solana token per compound.
nodes.finNote: Built by Molecule in 3 weeks. Gamified longevity research. Nov 2024 GitHub key leak incident. Revenue from trading fees + DTC sales.

nodes.name: Rare Compute
nodes.desc: GPU marketplace for antibody optimization. RL agents on Lilypad containers.
nodes.techStack: Ethereum, Lilypad, compute-credit NFTs, RL agents
nodes.compNote: GPU marketplace. Compute credits informative for infra costs.
nodes.finModel: Token + Grants. Compute-credit NFTs.
nodes.finNote: GPU marketplace for antibody optimization. RL agents on Lilypad.

nodes.name: ResearchHub
nodes.desc: Open science publishing. RSC token for peer-review bounties. AI reviewer. Coinbase-backed.
nodes.techStack: React, Base L2, RSC token, LLM reviewer
nodes.decentNote: On-chain tokens, centralized platform hosting. Moderate.
nodes.compNote: Direct competitor. Open publishing + bounties. Lacks citation-graph AI and EigenTrust reputation.
nodes.finModel: VC ($7M total: $5M OSSCI 2023, $2M Boost VC 2025). Pre-revenue. RSC token rewards.
nodes.finNote: For-profit startup + ResearchHub Foundation (token governance). Brian Armstrong (Coinbase CEO) co-founder. Paid $1M to peer reviewers. RSC down 95% from Jan 2025 peak. Charges researchers nothing.

nodes.name: Rejuve AI
nodes.desc: Mobile longevity platform. Ensemble age models. RJV token. SingularityNET ecosystem.
nodes.techStack: Cardano, RJV token, ensemble ML, mobile
nodes.decentNote: SingularityNET AI infra. Token data contribution.
nodes.compNote: Longevity AI. Ensemble models informative. SingularityNET ecosystem.
nodes.finModel: Token sale (~$3M). RJV token. SingularityNET spinout. Pre-revenue.
nodes.finNote: Ben Goertzel project. RJV trading at fractions of a cent. Longevity AI focus. Part of SingularityNET ecosystem.

nodes.name: ValleyDAO / Phlo
nodes.desc: SynBio venture studio. AI copilot for techno-economics. VLY token. Climate biotech.
nodes.techStack: Base, VLY token, AI copilot, IPFS
nodes.compNote: AI copilot assessment similar to AI credibility engine. Different domain.
nodes.finModel: DAO + Retro-PGF. $GROW token (governance + IP exposure). $100K from Juniper VC. IPTokens ($HEMPY, $FORGE).
nodes.finNote: Climate biotech focus. Phlo AI platform. Imperial College collaborations. Token provides exposure to funded IP.

nodes.name: VitaDAO
nodes.desc: Flagship longevity DAO. IP-NFTs, VITA token, 20+ projects. $10M+ raised. Pfizer Ventures.
nodes.decentNote: Mature DAO governance. Pfizer Ventures adds institutional legitimacy.
nodes.compNote: Partner not competitor. They fund research; we review/publish it. IP-NFT complementary.
nodes.finModel: Token sales + institutional ($4.1M Pfizer Ventures, 2023). Treasury ~$18M. IP licensing, spinouts.
nodes.finNote: Pure DAO with VitaTech for-profit subsidiary (2023). Pfizer Ventures investment was first pharma-to-DAO deal. VITA token fixed supply (64.3M). Funds researchers, doesn't charge them.

nodes.name: Welshare Health
nodes.desc: Consent marketplace for health data. Consent NFTs, WEL tokens. ZK-DP proofs planned.
nodes.techStack: Ethereum, WEL token, consent NFTs, ZK-DP
nodes.compNote: Health data consent. ZK-DP proofs relevant to reviewer privacy.
nodes.finModel: Grants. Patient-owned health records. Consent management.
nodes.finNote: Grant-funded. Focus on patient data sovereignty. No commercial extraction.

nodes.name: Molecule
nodes.desc: IP-NFT infrastructure and BioDAO launchpad. Molecule Labs ('GitHub for DeSci'). Founded 2020.
nodes.people: Paul Kohlhaas, Tyler Golato, Kevin Noessler
nodes.compNote: Infra provider. Molecule Labs could integrate with our publishing layer. IP-NFT orthogonal to peer review.
nodes.finModel: VC seed ($12.7M, 2022). Platform fees on Catalyst launches. 5% BIO token allocation.
nodes.finNote: For-profit GmbH (Switzerland). Revenue from IP-NFT minting, bonding curve fees. Does not charge researchers directly. Northpond Ventures, Shine Capital, 1kx led rounds.

nodes.name: BIO Protocol
nodes.desc: Metaplatform: BioDAO incubation, hackathons, grants. Raised $33M+. Binance Labs backed.
nodes.decentNote: Token governance for BioDAO selection. $33M raised.
nodes.compNote: Metaplatform. Potential accelerator/funder. No direct publishing competition.
nodes.finModel: Genesis auctions (~$33M), Binance Labs strategic, $6.9M seed (Maelstrom). Launchpad fees, LP revenue.
nodes.finNote: Zug, Switzerland entity. BIO token down 98% from peak. $4M+ LP fees reported. Animoca Brands, Mechanism Capital invested. Arthur Hayes (Maelstrom) led seed.

nodes.name: Episteme
nodes.desc: Claim-native architecture. Hypotheses as tokens, AI-oracled resolution, bonding curves. Market philosophy.
nodes.techStack: Humanode L1, bonding curves, AI oracles
nodes.decentNote: Whitepaper stage. Market incentives vs reputation.
nodes.compNote: Philosophically opposed: market truth via bonding curves vs commons credibility. AI oracle vs AI reviewer matching.
nodes.finModel: No funding disclosed. Testnet on Humanode. No token, no revenue.
nodes.finNote: Sasha Shilina's research prototype. Market-oriented philosophy (prediction markets) but pre-operational. Cannot assess true incentive alignment yet.

nodes.name: Ocean Protocol
nodes.desc: Data tokenization marketplace. Dataset NFTs, compute-to-data.
nodes.techStack: Ethereum, OCEAN token, compute-to-data, data NFTs
nodes.decentNote: Strong protocol decentralization. Open source. Permissionless.
nodes.compNote: Data layer. Compute-to-data useful for citation graph processing. No publishing overlap.
nodes.finModel: Token sales ($39.2M). Marketplace fees, Data Farming, 5% burn mechanism.
nodes.finNote: Singapore Foundation. Withdrew from ASI Alliance Oct 2025 amid $100M+ token dispute. Cypher Capital $5M (2022). Fee-sharing with veOCEAN stakers.

nodes.name: Numerai
nodes.desc: Crowdsourced hedge fund. Data scientists stake NMR on trading models.
nodes.compNote: Market model opposite to commons approach. Staking model informative for mechanism design.
nodes.finModel: Hedge fund fees (25.45% net return 2024). $550M AUM. VC ($42.8M). NMR staking/burning.
nodes.finNote: San Francisco C-Corp. Proven revenue model. USV, Paradigm, Paul Tudor Jones invested. JPMorgan committed $500M capacity. ~6 employees. $500M valuation.

nodes.name: Polymarket
nodes.desc: General prediction market. Proven liquidity. No scientific provenance.
nodes.techStack: Polygon, CLOB order book, UMA oracle
nodes.compNote: No scientific provenance. Reference for market mechanics only.
nodes.finModel: VC mega-rounds ($2.3B total, $2B Series D from ICE Oct 2025). Zero trading fees. Pre-revenue.
nodes.finNote: Blockratize Inc. (New York). $9B valuation. Founders Fund, Vitalik Buterin, Point72 invested. Planning POLY token. Pure VC subsidy model currently.

nodes.name: HairDAO
nodes.desc: Hair loss research DAO. First medical patent by a DAO. FoliCool D2C product. $122M treasury.
nodes.decentNote: First medical patent by a DAO. D2C product.
nodes.compNote: Partner for hair loss research publishing. Patient-led governance reference.
nodes.finModel: Seed round ($3.3M+ from Cherry Ventures, Libertus, Zee Prime). HAIR token (~$9.5M mcap).
nodes.finNote: Hair loss research. Most VC-backed of the small BioDAOs. Plans commercialization via spinouts.

nodes.name: AthenaDAO
nodes.desc: Women's health R&D DAO. 250+ reviews, $500K funded, 14 IP deals. 11K members.
nodes.compNote: Partner for women's health. 250+ reviews show governance at scale.
nodes.finModel: Token sale via bio.xyz (~$350K treasury). IP-NFT investments.
nodes.finNote: Women's health focus. Small treasury. Community-funded. Plans commercialization via licensing.

nodes.name: CerebrumDAO
nodes.desc: Brain research and neurodegeneration DAO. NEURON token governance. BIO Protocol incubated.
nodes.compNote: Domain partner for neuroscience publishing.
nodes.finModel: IPT sales ($500K+). NEURON token (~$16.7M mcap). BIO Protocol ecosystem.
nodes.finNote: Neuroscience focus. Community-funded. IP-NFT investment model.

nodes.name: PsyDAO
nodes.desc: Psychedelics research DAO. BIO Protocol incubated.
nodes.compNote: Niche partner for psychedelics research.
nodes.finModel: Token sale (~$2M). Molecule/bio.xyz ecosystem. Gitcoin grants.
nodes.finNote: Psychedelics research DAO. PSY token. Funds research, doesn't charge researchers. Part of BIO Protocol ecosystem.

nodes.name: CryoDAO
nodes.desc: Cryopreservation research DAO. BIO Protocol incubated.
nodes.compNote: Cryopreservation niche.
nodes.finModel: DAO treasury. CRYO token. Community-funded cryonics research.
nodes.finNote: Cryopreservation research DAO. Part of BIO Protocol ecosystem. Small treasury.

nodes.name: Curetopia
nodes.desc: First BioDAO on Solana. Rare disease treatments. $1.77M raised.
nodes.techStack: Solana, yeast drug repurposing, BIO Launchpad
nodes.compNote: Rare disease DAO on Solana.
nodes.finModel: BIO Protocol launchpad ($1.77M, March 2025). CURES token on Solana.
nodes.finNote: Swiss Verein (nonprofit association). First Solana-native BioDAO. Perlara partnership. Rare disease focus.

nodes.name: DeSci Labs / Nodes
nodes.desc: Research object versioning. DPID persistent identifiers. SciWeave AI assistant for literature insights.
nodes.decentNote: Strong provenance. Content-addressed storage. Team-led governance.
nodes.compNote: Publishing infra overlap. DPID complementary. SciWeave AI is different focus.
nodes.finModel: VC ($6.5M: Stride VC, Protocol Labs, Holtzbrinck Digital). Free for researchers. No token.
nodes.finNote: Amsterdam startup. Holtzbrinck (Springer Nature parent) invested. DeSci Nodes on IPFS. Plans premium features, currently free.

nodes.name: Orvium
nodes.desc: Open science publishing. Decentralized Autonomous Journals. EU-funded MVP.
nodes.decentNote: DAJ model. EU institutional backing. Beta.
nodes.compNote: Strong overlap: DAJs similar to DAO journals. Lacks AI reviewer matching and citation graph.
nodes.finModel: EU grants (Horizon 2020). Blockchain-based manuscript management.
nodes.finNote: Spanish startup. CERN spin-off. EU-funded but for-profit structure. Plans premium features.

nodes.name: OriginTrail
nodes.desc: Decentralized Knowledge Graph (DKG). TRAC token.
nodes.techStack: Multi-chain, TRAC token, DKG, semantic web
nodes.compNote: Knowledge graph complements citation graph. DKG for data provenance relevant to attribution.
nodes.finModel: ICO ($22.5M, 2018). Zero VC. EU Horizon 2020 grants. Enterprise B2B revenue.
nodes.finNote: Trace Labs (Hong Kong for-profit) + Trace Alliance (nonprofit). 125M+ Knowledge Assets. Walmart uses for 40% of US import security audits. TRAC is pure utility, no inflation.

nodes.name: GenomesDAO
nodes.desc: DNA data vaults. Genome Mining Vault. Personal genomics ownership.
nodes.compNote: Genomics ownership. Data sovereignty relevant to author rights.
nodes.finModel: Token sale (GENOME). Privacy-preserving genomic data marketplace.
nodes.finNote: Users own and monetize their genomic data. Token incentives for data contribution. Encrypgen partnership.

nodes.name: Hippocrat
nodes.desc: Healthcare Data Protocol. ZK proofs for sovereignty. HPO token.
nodes.techStack: Bitcoin L2, HPO token, ZK Filters, FHIR
nodes.compNote: ZK proofs approach relevant to reviewer anonymity design.
nodes.finModel: Token (HPO). Healthcare data sovereignty. Patient data marketplace.
nodes.finNote: Korean project. Patients monetize health data. Token economy for data sharing.

nodes.name: DeSci World
nodes.desc: Ecosystem directory. 75+ projects. Fellowship program.
nodes.compNote: Directory. Not competitor. Ecosystem mapping.
nodes.finModel: Community-supported. Event aggregation. No token.
nodes.finNote: DeSci community hub. Event listings, resources. Volunteer/community run.

nodes.name: DeSci Berlin
nodes.desc: Annual conference at Molecule HQ. 350+ in-person, 53K online (2025).
nodes.compNote: Conference. Networking.
nodes.finModel: Sponsorship + ticket sales. Annual conference.
nodes.finNote: Conference event. Protocol Labs, Molecule sponsors. Registration fees + sponsors.

nodes.name: DeSci London
nodes.desc: 2-day conference at UCL. DEI travel grants.
nodes.compNote: Conference at UCL.
nodes.finModel: Sponsorship + ticket sales. Annual conference.
nodes.finNote: Conference event. Major DeSci gathering. Registration fees + sponsors.

nodes.name: Dynex
nodes.desc: Neuromorphic computing. DNX token. Proof of Useful Work.
nodes.techStack: Own chain, DNX token, neuromorphic, PoUW
nodes.decentNote: Own chain. Proof of Useful Work.
nodes.compNote: Compute. PoUW aligns mining with research.
nodes.finModel: Token (DNX). Neuromorphic computing. Mining-based.
nodes.finNote: Quantum-inspired computing. Token mining for compute contribution. Commercial applications.

nodes.name: The Innovation Game
nodes.desc: Algorithm development protocol. Synthetic market for solutions.
nodes.compNote: Algorithm marketplace. Synthetic market informative.
nodes.finModel: Token. Algorithmic competition platform. Winner-takes-rewards.
nodes.finNote: The Innovation Game. Competitive algorithm optimization. Token incentives for compute.

nodes.name: Pfizer Ventures
nodes.desc: Corporate VC. Invested in VitaDAO.
nodes.compNote: Funder. Validates DeSci institutionally.
nodes.finModel: Corporate VC arm. Strategic biotech investments.
nodes.finNote: Pfizer's venture arm. First pharma to invest in a DAO (VitaDAO). Strategic not financial returns primary.

nodes.name: Binance Labs
nodes.desc: Crypto VC. Led BIO Protocol round.
nodes.compNote: Funder.
nodes.finModel: Corporate VC. Crypto/blockchain investments. Exchange-backed.
nodes.finNote: Binance's investment arm. BIO Protocol was first DeSci bet. Strategic ecosystem building.

nodes.name: SingularityNET
nodes.desc: Decentralized AI marketplace. Parent of Rejuve AI.
nodes.compNote: AI marketplace could host our credibility models.
nodes.finModel: ICO ($36M, 2017). AGIX token. AI marketplace fees.
nodes.finNote: Ben Goertzel. ASI Alliance (with Fetch.ai, Ocean withdrew). Decentralized AI marketplace.

nodes.name: NobleBlocks
nodes.desc: Decentralized academic publishing on Internet Computer (ICP). NOBL tokens reward contributors.
nodes.compNote: Publishing competitor on ICP. NOBL token vs non-financial reputation. No AI credibility layer.
nodes.finModel: Token (NOBL). Blockchain publishing. Smart contract peer review.
nodes.finNote: Token-incentivized publishing. Early stage. Reviewer reputation on-chain.

nodes.name: YesNoError
nodes.desc: AI agent auditing arXiv papers daily for mathematical errors and data inconsistencies. YNE token governance.
nodes.techStack: LLMs, arXiv API, YNE token, Ethereum
nodes.decentNote: Autonomous AI agents. Token governance. Narrow scope.
nodes.compNote: Complementary: error detection could feed our credibility pipeline. Narrow scope vs full peer review.
nodes.finModel: Token (YNE). AI-powered scientific claim verification.
nodes.finNote: AI audit of scientific papers. Token incentives for verification. Early stage.

nodes.name: Open Humans
nodes.desc: Citizen science platform for democratized health data access. Blockchain-secured data sharing.
nodes.compNote: Citizen science data model relevant to tiered reviewer concept.
nodes.finModel: Grants (Knight Foundation, Shuttleworth). Citizen science data sharing.
nodes.finNote: Open Humans Foundation. Personal Genome Project spinoff. Data commons model.

nodes.name: Quantum Biology DAO
nodes.desc: Accelerates quantum biology research. Raised 1,724 WETH via BIO Protocol auction.
nodes.compNote: Quantum biology niche. Physics crossover.
nodes.finModel: IPT sale (1,724 WETH raised). Quantum biology research.
nodes.finNote: Significant IPT raise (~$5M+ at ETH prices). Quantum effects in biology focus. BIO Protocol ecosystem.

nodes.name: Vibe Bio
nodes.desc: AI-powered drug diligence for rare disease treatments. Launched New Hope Therapeutics spinout.
nodes.techStack: Ethereum, AI diligence, New Hope Therapeutics
nodes.compNote: AI drug diligence similar to AI credibility scoring. Different domain.
nodes.finModel: VC ($12M Initialized Capital). Abandoned DAO model. Traditional venture structure.
nodes.finNote: Pivoted from $VIBE token to C-Corp fund model. Naval Ravikant, Balaji Srinivasan angels. Creates separate C-corps per drug program. VibeOne AI platform.

nodes.name: Hippo Protocol
nodes.desc: Layer 1 healthcare blockchain. HIPAA-compliant data sharing with ZK Filters and FHIR mapping.
nodes.techStack: Own L1, ZK Filters, FHIR, HIPAA-compliant
nodes.compNote: ZK Filters for HIPAA relevant to privacy-preserving review.
nodes.finModel: VC-backed. Healthcare data interoperability.
nodes.finNote: Enterprise healthcare focus. VC funding model. B2B revenue target.

nodes.name: AminoChain
nodes.desc: Decentralized biobank protocol. a16z-backed L2 harmonizing metadata across 20+ biobanks globally.
nodes.decentNote: VC-backed centralized dev. Decentralized data layer.
nodes.compNote: Biobank infra. Data harmonization approach informative.
nodes.finModel: VC ($7M: $5M a16z crypto seed). Biosample marketplace fees planned.
nodes.finNote: a16z's first DeSci investment. Specimen Center GA May 2025. Blockchain-tracked biosamples. Arianna Simpson (a16z) led.

nodes.name: NanoVita
nodes.desc: DeSci protocol integrating AI bio-intelligence and health data. $20M Series A valuation.
nodes.decentNote: $20M Series A. Traditional funding. Low decentralization.
nodes.compNote: Health AI. Different domain.
nodes.finModel: VC ($20M Series A). AI health platform. Subscription model.
nodes.finNote: Series A stage. AI-powered health recommendations. Consumer subscription model.

nodes.name: Genpulse
nodes.desc: DePIN project incentivizing users to contribute scalp data for dermatological research.
nodes.compNote: DePIN data collection informs reviewer incentive design.
nodes.finModel: Token. DePIN for genomic data collection.
nodes.finNote: Decentralized genomic data network. Token rewards for data contribution.

nodes.name: Stadium.Science
nodes.desc: Gamified health trials via prediction markets. Operates Sleep2Earn for biometric data collection.
nodes.compNote: Gamified science evaluation + prediction markets. Could integrate.
nodes.finModel: Token. Gamified science experiments. Speculation-driven.
nodes.finNote: Similar to Pump Science. Gamified research funding. Token speculation element.

nodes.name: Ants-Review
nodes.desc: Ethereum protocol for incentivized open peer review with ZK-SNARK privacy. Won ETHTurin 2020. 353 commits. Kovan testnet (deprecated).
nodes.techStack: Solidity, IPFS, AZTEC ZK-SNARKs, ERC20 bounties
nodes.decentNote: Full on-chain peer review bounties. ZK privacy for reviewers. Testnet only, now deprecated.
nodes.compNote: Direct precursor to our approach. Bounty-based peer review + ZK privacy. Abandoned but code is open. Key learning: needed product focus beyond smart contracts.
nodes.finModel: None. Academic prototype. ETH Turin Hackathon 2020 winner. First DeSci Gitcoin grant.
nodes.finNote: Bianca Trovò (Sorbonne/CEA). Bounty-based peer review smart contracts. Never scaled beyond PoC. Dormant.

nodes.name: BeerReview
nodes.desc: Blockchain peer review with LLM auto-abstracts. Alpha: 19 articles, 31 comments, 23 users. SM2 encryption. TEE security.
nodes.techStack: React, Ethereum private PoS, SM2 encryption, LLM abstracts, TEE/TPM
nodes.decentNote: Private chain limits decentralization. Academic prototype with institutional control.
nodes.compNote: Most recent academic prototype (2024). LLM integration for abstracts is novel. Private chain, not public Ethereum.
nodes.finModel: Academic prototype. No funding. Joke peer review concept.
nodes.finNote: Academic humor project. Not an actual platform. Satirical peer review over beer.

nodes.name: bloxberg
nodes.desc: Research blockchain consortium. Max Planck Society led. Proof of Authority. 47 institutional nodes.
nodes.decentNote: Consortium chain. Validators are research institutions. Not permissionless.
nodes.compNote: Research-specific blockchain. Could be infrastructure layer for our smart contracts. Max Planck credibility.
nodes.finModel: Institutional consortium. Max Planck Society + 40 research orgs. No token.
nodes.finNote: Research institution blockchain. PoA consensus by verified scientists. No commercial model.

nodes.name: OpScientia / Holonym
nodes.desc: Decentralized researcher identity. DeSci DID registry bridging ORCID to blockchain. ZK identity wallet.
nodes.techStack: Ethereum, Polygon, IPFS, Ceramic, ZK wallet, ORCID bridge
nodes.decentNote: Protocol-level identity. ZK proofs for privacy. Bridges Web2 credentials to Web3.
nodes.compNote: Direct complement to our ORCID+SBT identity layer. Their DID registry could power our reviewer verification.
nodes.finModel: Grants. Rebranded to Holonym. ZK identity for science.
nodes.finNote: Pivoted from OpSci to Holonym (ZK identity). Grant-funded but exploring enterprise.

nodes.name: Peer Community In (PCI)
nodes.desc: Free community peer review of preprints. 14 thematic communities. Diamond OA journal. 10K+ visitors/month.
nodes.techStack: Web platform, community curation, WoS/Scopus indexed
nodes.decentNote: Community-governed but centralized infrastructure. No blockchain. Strong academic legitimacy.
nodes.compNote: Highest philosophical alignment in traditional space. Community review model we could tokenize. Diamond OA = no APCs.
nodes.finModel: Institutional support (INRAE, CNRS). Diamond OA overlay journals. No APCs.
nodes.finNote: Peer Community In. French institutional backing. Free for authors and readers. Recommends preprints.

nodes.name: eLife (new model)
nodes.desc: Eliminated accept/reject. Reviews preprints only. Public reviews. HHMI/Wellcome/Max Planck funded. 2200+ reviewed preprints.
nodes.techStack: Custom platform, preprint integration, public review display
nodes.decentNote: Centralized nonprofit. Funded by 3 mega-foundations. Revolutionary model but traditional infrastructure.
nodes.compNote: Most philosophically aligned traditional journal. No gatekeeping = our approach. DeSci adds economic incentives layer they lack.
nodes.finModel: Foundation grants (HHMI, Wellcome, Max Planck). No APCs. Review+publish model.
nodes.finNote: Reformed 2023 to publish-then-review. Ended rejection. Major foundation backing. Strong UNESCO alignment.

nodes.name: Review Commons
nodes.desc: Journal-independent preprint peer review. EMBO + ASAPbio. Portable reviews transferable to 27+ affiliate journals.
nodes.decentNote: Centralized under EMBO. Reviews portable but process is traditional.
nodes.compNote: Portable review model we could replicate on-chain. Reviews transfer across journals = our transparent review vision.
nodes.finModel: Foundation support (EMBO, ASAPbio). Journal-agnostic reviews. Free service.
nodes.finNote: Portable peer review platform. EMBO backing. Transfers reviews to partner journals. Pure public good.

nodes.name: PREreview
nodes.desc: Open-source community preprint review. ORCID-based identity. Focus on equity and early-career researchers. Gates funded.
nodes.techStack: Open source, ORCID auth, community moderation
nodes.decentNote: Open source. ORCID-based. Community-governed. No blockchain.
nodes.compNote: Community preprint review with ORCID = closest traditional analog to our model. Could add token incentives.
nodes.finModel: Foundation grants (Gates, CZI). Community preprint reviews. Free.
nodes.finNote: Training + review platform. Code for Science & Society fiscal sponsor. Strong open science values.

nodes.name: OpenReview
nodes.desc: Configurable open peer review platform. Dominant in ML/AI conferences (NeurIPS, ICLR, ICML). Proven at scale.
nodes.techStack: Python, conference management, configurable review workflows
nodes.decentNote: UMass-run. Centralized but open source. Dominant in CS/AI community.
nodes.compNote: Proven open review at massive scale (NeurIPS). Configurable workflows we should study. No incentive layer.
nodes.finModel: Academic grants. ML conference hosting fees. OpenReview.net.
nodes.finNote: UMass Amherst + Google. Powers NeurIPS, ICLR submissions. Minimal fees for large conferences.

nodes.name: JoVE
nodes.desc: Peer-reviewed video journal. Professional videographers film experiments. PubMed/SCIE indexed. $2,400/article.
nodes.compNote: $2,400/article monopoly on video abstracts. Our SciComm marketplace could disrupt with tokenized incentives at fraction of cost.
nodes.finModel: Subscriptions + author fees ($2,400/video). $1.7M angel. $100M+ revenue. Profitable since 2009.
nodes.finNote: Video journal. 1,800+ institutional subscribers. 648 employees. Author pays for video production. Traditional publishing economics.

nodes.name: Sapien Capital
nodes.desc: $65M DeSci venture fund by Sei Foundation. Check sizes $100K-$2M. Focus on bringing scientific IP on-chain.
nodes.people: Justin Barlow, Eleanor Davies, Michael Baran
nodes.compNote: $65M dedicated DeSci fund. Potential funder for us. Check sizes $100K-$2M fit our stage.
nodes.finModel: Sei Foundation ecosystem fund. DeSci/AI focus.
nodes.finNote: Sei blockchain ecosystem fund. Supporting DeSci on Sei. Grant + investment hybrid.

nodes.name: OpenAlex
nodes.desc: Free open bibliographic catalog. 271M works, CC0 data. 1.5B API calls/month. Successor to Microsoft Academic Graph.
nodes.techStack: PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, REST API, CC0 license
nodes.decentNote: Nonprofit. CC0 data = fully open. Community-governed roadmap.
nodes.compNote: PRIMARY DATA SOURCE for our citation graph AI. 271M works, CC0. We build ON this, not compete with it.
nodes.finModel: Grants ($11.7M: $7.5M Arcadia, $3.5M Wellcome). Premium API subscriptions. $800K ARR.
nodes.finNote: Same as OpenAlex. OurResearch 501(c)(3). Grant-to-earned-revenue transition succeeding.

nodes.name: OpenCitations
nodes.desc: Open citation data infrastructure. 1.82B unique open citations. Semantic Web / Linked Open Data.
nodes.techStack: RDF, SPARQL, REST API, CC0 license
nodes.decentNote: University of Bologna. Open data. Academic governance.
nodes.compNote: 1.82B citations, CC0. Complements OpenAlex for our citation graph. On-chain anchoring could add trust layer.
nodes.finModel: SCOSS pledging + EU grants (OpenAIRE). Open citation data.
nodes.finNote: University of Bologna. I4OC initiative. CC0 citation data. Pure open infrastructure.

nodes.name: DeSci Foundation
nodes.desc: Geneva-based nonprofit. Bridges traditional science and DeSci. Board includes George Church, Gustav Nilsonne.
nodes.decentNote: Traditional nonprofit governance. Advisory board of prominent scientists.
nodes.compNote: Legitimacy bridge. George Church, Gideon Nave on board. Could validate our approach.
nodes.finModel: Grants + donations. Supporting DeSci ecosystem.
nodes.finNote: Juan Benet (Protocol Labs) on board. Philipp Koellinger co-founder. Ecosystem support.

nodes.name: Gitcoin DeSci Rounds
nodes.desc: Quadratic funding for DeSci. $650K+ matching since 2022. GR15: $500K matching, 82 projects, 2309 donors.
nodes.funding: Ethereum Foundation, Protocol Labs, Vitalik Buterin
nodes.decentNote: Fully on-chain quadratic funding. High decentralization. Sybil resistance via Passport.
nodes.compNote: Potential funding source for us. Quadratic funding model informative for our governance design.
nodes.finModel: Quadratic funding rounds. Ethereum Foundation + Protocol Labs + Vitalik matching.
nodes.finNote: DeSci-specific Gitcoin rounds. QF mechanism. Major ecosystem funders provide matching pool.

nodes.name: PubPeer
nodes.desc: Post-publication anonymous commentary. Identified major fraud cases (STAP cells). Community watchdog.
nodes.techStack: Web platform, anonymous commenting, browser extension
nodes.decentNote: Anonymous by design. Community-funded. No institutional control.
nodes.compNote: Post-publication review = complementary to our pre-publication review. Could add reputation tokens and blockchain credentials.
nodes.finModel: Donations. Post-publication commentary platform. No fees.
nodes.finNote: Anonymous post-publication peer review. Fraud detection focus. Donation-supported.

nodes.name: Seeds of Science
nodes.desc: Community-driven decentralized journal for unconventional scientific ideas. Volunteer reviewers vote on submissions.
nodes.decentNote: Fully community-governed. Volunteer model. No institutional backing.
nodes.compNote: Community review + voting = closest traditional analog to our DAO-governed review. Could tokenize their model.
nodes.finModel: Volunteer-run. No funding. Community journal for unconventional ideas.
nodes.finNote: Pure volunteer effort. Diamond OA. Accepts speculative/unconventional science. Zero budget.

nodes.name: F1000Research
nodes.desc: Publish-first, open peer review after. 3-tier approval system. Now Taylor & Francis. APCs $800-$1,350.
nodes.decentNote: Corporate-owned (Taylor & Francis). APC model. Centralized editorial.
nodes.compNote: Publish-first model aligns with our PRC approach. Their 3-tier approval inspired our tiered reviewer model.
nodes.finModel: APCs ($1,350-$2,800). Acquired by Taylor & Francis 2020. Open peer review.
nodes.finNote: Owned by major commercial publisher (Informa). Post-publication peer review model but APC-funded.

nodes.name: Bacalhau
nodes.desc: Distributed compute orchestration. 'Compute over Data' on IPFS/Filecoin. Powers DeSci Labs and LabDAO.
nodes.decentNote: Protocol Labs ecosystem. Open source. Decentralized compute coordination.
nodes.compNote: Could provide compute infra for our AI credibility engine. Powers DeSci Labs already.
nodes.finModel: Protocol Labs subsidiary. Compute-over-data on IPFS. No token.
nodes.finNote: Expanso company. Protocol Labs ecosystem. Enterprise compute focus. LabDAO uses for PLEX.

nodes.name: Kudos
nodes.desc: Helps researchers explain research in plain language, track impact metrics. 250K+ researchers. 23% higher download growth.
nodes.compNote: SciComm + impact tracking. Our marketplace could integrate their plain-language approach with visual content creation.
nodes.finModel: VC-backed. Research communication/impact tracking. Freemium SaaS.
nodes.finNote: UK company. Helps researchers track and share impact. Publisher partnerships. B2B focus.

nodes.name: Etica Protocol
nodes.desc: Community voting on research proposals with ETI cryptocurrency rewards. Own PoW chain.
nodes.techStack: Own PoW chain, ETI token, community voting
nodes.decentNote: Own chain with PoW consensus. Fully permissionless. High decentralization.
nodes.compNote: Community voting on research proposals. DAO governance model informative.
nodes.finModel: Protocol mining (ETI). No ICO, no premine.
nodes.finNote: Fair launch. Disease research funding via protocol emissions. No centralized funding.

nodes.name: Gridcoin
nodes.desc: Tokens rewarding BOINC scientific computing contributions. Proof of Research consensus.
nodes.techStack: Own chain, Proof of Research, BOINC integration
nodes.decentNote: Decentralized compute rewards. 10+ years running. Community-governed.
nodes.compNote: Proof of Research consensus is conceptually relevant to our credibility scoring.
nodes.finModel: Community mining. Rewards BOINC contributions. No ICO, no premine.
nodes.finNote: Fair launch 2013. PoS + PoR (Research). Rewards distributed computing for science projects.

nodes.name: SciNet / OpSci
nodes.desc: Decentralized science data storage and knowledge graph. IPFS-based. Community curated.
nodes.compNote: Knowledge graph approach relevant to our citation graph.
nodes.finModel: Grants. OpScientia/Holonym rebrand. Open science infrastructure.
nodes.finNote: Originally OpSci. Pivoted to Holonym (identity). Grant-funded open science tools.

nodes.name: TalentDAO
nodes.desc: DAO for organizational science research. Community-reviewed publications. Gitcoin-funded.
nodes.decentNote: DAO-governed publishing. Gitcoin QF funded. Narrow domain.
nodes.compNote: DAO-governed publishing overlaps directly. Social science focus.
nodes.finModel: DAO. Research on talent/work futures.
nodes.finNote: Research DAO focused on future of work. Publishing arm.

nodes.name: ORCID
nodes.desc: Persistent researcher identifiers. 19M+ registered researchers. 1,518 member orgs. 1,200+ integrations.
nodes.decentNote: US nonprofit. Board-governed. 1518 member organizations. Open data.
nodes.compNote: We build ON ORCID for identity verification. 1200+ integrations = massive moat. Complement not compete.
nodes.finModel: Institutional memberships ($6.8M/yr revenue). 1,200+ paying orgs. Tiered fees.
nodes.finNote: US 501(c)(3). Wellcome Trust, Thomson Reuters founding supporters. Free for researchers, membership required to change. Gold standard for sustainable open infra.

nodes.name: Crossref / DOI
nodes.desc: DOI registration and metadata. 24K+ members. 180M records. 1.1B resolutions/month. $14M/year revenue.
nodes.techStack: REST API, 180M DOIs, XML metadata, one-member-one-vote governance
nodes.decentNote: US 501(c)(6). Democratic governance. Single point of failure risk (outage Mar 2026).
nodes.compNote: DOI system we must integrate with. IPFS CIDs could complement DOIs. Central failure risk = opportunity.
nodes.finModel: Membership fees (~$14M/yr). DOI registration. Nonprofit governance.
nodes.finNote: Essential infrastructure. Publisher-funded membership. No researcher fees. Metadata freely available.

nodes.name: Maelstrom Fund (Arthur Hayes)
nodes.desc: Crypto fund led by Arthur Hayes. Led BIO Protocol $6.9M seed round (Sep 2025).
nodes.compNote: Led BIO Protocol seed. Crypto-native DeSci investor.
nodes.finModel: Family office/fund. Arthur Hayes. Crypto-native investments.
nodes.finNote: BitMEX founder's fund. Led BIO Protocol seed. High-risk crypto focus.

nodes.name: Northpond Ventures
nodes.desc: $3B biotech VC. Led Molecule's $12.7M seed. Largest DeSci equity raise.
nodes.compNote: $3B biotech fund. Bridges pharma and DeSci. Led largest DeSci equity round.
nodes.finModel: VC fund ($3B AUM). Life sciences focus. Traditional biotech VC.
nodes.finNote: Led Molecule seed. $3B AUM. Traditional biotech VC entering DeSci.

nodes.name: OSS Capital
nodes.desc: VC focused on open-source. Led ResearchHub $5M round. Also invested in DeSci Labs.
nodes.compNote: Open-source VC backing both ResearchHub and DeSci Labs. Strong alignment with our commons philosophy.
nodes.finModel: VC fund. Open source software focus. COSS model.
nodes.finNote: Commercial Open Source Software fund. Led ResearchHub round. Joseph Jacks founder.

people.name: Paul Kohlhaas
people.role: Co-founder & CEO, Molecule. Founding Member, BIO Protocol. Co-initiator, VitaDAO.

people.name: Antonio Tenorio-Fornes
people.role: Researcher, UCM Madrid. Blockchain peer review pioneer.

people.name: Ethan Perlstein
people.role: CSO, Curetopia. Harvard PhD, Y Combinator alum. Community-driven rare disease drug dev.

people.name: Alok Tayi
people.role: Founder, Vibe Bio. Scientist and entrepreneur using DAO models for orphan drugs.

people.name: Jelani Clarke
people.role: Executive Lead, AminoChain. Advocate for data sovereignty in healthcare.

people.name: Vincent Weisser
people.role: Co-founder VitaDAO, Molecule. Prime Intellect co-founder.

people.name: Michael Baran
people.role: Pfizer Ventures Partner. Sapien Capital DeSci Advisor. PhD MBA.

people.name: Arianna Simpson
people.role: a16z Crypto GP. Led AminoChain (first DeSci deal).

people.name: Philipp Koellinger
people.role: Co-founder DeSci Labs & DeSci Foundation. VU Amsterdam professor. Published in Nature/Science.

people.name: Justin Barlow
people.role: Head of BD, Sapien Capital. Ex-Solana Ventures. Deploying $65M DeSci fund.

people.name: Juan Benet
people.role: Founder, Protocol Labs (IPFS/Filecoin). DeSci Foundation board.

people.name: Jocelynn Pearl
people.role: Co-founded LabDAO. DeSci Wiki curator. UltraRare Podcast host.

people.name: Arthur Hayes
people.role: Founder, Maelstrom Fund. Led BIO Protocol seed. BitMEX co-founder.

people.name: Patrick Malone
people.role: Partner, Northpond Ventures. MD PhD. Led Molecule $12.7M seed.

people.name: Balaji Srinivasan
people.role: Former Coinbase CTO. Most prolific DeSci angel: Molecule, VitaDAO, LabDAO.
